name: Don't you remember?
description:
You have the power of instantly gaslighting anyone: If you ask them if they remember something, they will remember it even if it never happened.

  1. Highschool crush at 10 year reunion

  2. Meeting up with college ex-girlfriend

  3. Performance review

  4. Stepsister being a tease while your parents are on vacation
creator: Dl_cats
